address.full: Iron District Gym, 4200 S Lamar Blvd, Austin, TX 78745

about: I'm Marcus Cole — a NASM-certified personal trainer with over 12 years of experience transforming bodies and mindsets. I started my journey at 19, overweight and unmotivated. Training saved my life, and now I dedicate mine to changing others'.
aboutExtended: Specializing in body recomposition, strength training, and sustainable nutrition. I don't do cookie-cutter. Every client gets a program built from scratch.
aboutStory: At 19, I was 260 lbs with no direction. A friend dragged me to a gym. That single hour changed the trajectory of my life. Within a year, I'd lost 80 lbs. Within two, I'd earned my first certification.
I've spent the last 12 years refining my craft — studying biomechanics, nutrition science, and behavioral psychology. I don't just train bodies. I build mindsets that last.

Based in Austin, TX, I work out of Iron District Gym — a no-frills warehouse space where the work speaks for itself. If you're looking for fancy smoothie bars, this isn't the place. If you're looking for results, welcome home.

programs.title: 1-on-1 Training
programs.shortDesc: Fully customized programs with hands-on coaching. Every rep, every set, every meal — built for you.
programs.who: For anyone serious about transformation — beginners to advanced athletes.

programs.title: Small Group
programs.shortDesc: High-energy sessions with 4-6 people max. Community push with personal attention.
programs.who: For those who thrive on community energy with a cap of 6 per session.
includes: Flexible schedule with multiple time slots

programs.title: Online Coaching
programs.shortDesc: Train anywhere with app-based programming, weekly check-ins, and macro tracking.
programs.who: For self-starters who want expert programming without geographic limits.
programs.sessions: Train on your schedule, check-ins bi-weekly

programs.title: Custom Meal Plans
programs.shortDesc: Nutrition blueprints tailored to your goals, lifestyle, and food preferences.
programs.who: For anyone who needs nutrition dialed in — standalone or as an add-on.

philosophy.title: TRAIN SMART
philosophy.desc: Progressive overload, periodization, and form-first coaching. No ego lifting, no wasted sets.

philosophy.title: EAT RIGHT
philosophy.desc: Macro-based nutrition that fits your life. No crash diets — sustainable fuel for lasting results.

philosophy.title: STAY CONSISTENT
philosophy.desc: The best program is the one you stick to. We build habits that outlast motivation.

trainingStyle.title: Strength First
trainingStyle.desc: Every program is built on progressive overload and compound movements. We build a foundation before we sculpt.

trainingStyle.title: Mind-Body
trainingStyle.desc: Training isn't just physical. We work on discipline, self-image, and mental resilience alongside every lift.

trainingStyle.title: Results-Driven
trainingStyle.desc: Biweekly assessments, body composition tracking, and program adjustments. Data, not guesswork.

testimonials.quote: Marcus didn't just change my body — he rewired how I think about discipline. Down 38 lbs and stronger than I've ever been.
testimonials.name: Rachel Nguyen

testimonials.quote: I'd tried everything before. Fad diets, random gym plans. Marcus gave me structure, accountability, and real results for the first time.
testimonials.name: Tom Alvarez

testimonials.quote: The small group sessions are addictive. The energy is unreal and Marcus pushes you just the right amount. Best investment in myself.
testimonials.name: Priya Kapoor
